prompt.task: Transform the following idea into a comprehensive Product Requirements Document (PRD) using our Feature Epic Issue Template structure. Create content that follows world-class PRD best practices and integrates seamlessly with our AAFD methodology.

context_loading.instructions: Before proceeding, read the context documentation inventory to identify relevant files: - Read: .claude/docs/.context-docs-inventory.xml Based on the idea's domain, read relevant context files: - For AI features: Read ai/portkey-integration.md, ai/prompt-engineering.md - For architecture decisions: Read architecture/system-design.md, architecture/service-patterns.md - For UI components: Read ui/component-patterns.md - For data/database: Read data/database-schema.md, data/supabase-patterns.md - For authentication: Read security/authentication-patterns.md - For project standards: Read CLAUDE.md for SlideHeroes-specific patterns

step.title: Analyze Problem and Solution
step.description: Identify the specific user problem, proposed solution, and business impact. Focus on why this matters to SlideHeroes users and business goals.

step.title: Define Success Metrics
step.description: Establish measurable user, business, and technical success criteria. Be specific with targets (e.g., "increase engagement by 15%").

step.title: Identify Target Users and Use Cases
step.description: Define primary persona, their current pain points, and key use cases using "As a... I want... so that..." format.

step.title: Specify Core Features
step.description: List core features with priorities, descriptions, and user value. Include functional acceptance criteria.

step.title: Analyze Technical Requirements
step.description: Identify architecture impact, required technologies, and file changes. Categorize files as read-only (for context) vs. writeable (to modify).

step.title: Define Scope and Constraints
step.description: Clearly separate in-scope vs. out-of-scope features. Identify technical, resource, and external constraints.

step.title: Assess Risks
step.description: Identify technical, business, and UX risks with impact levels and mitigation strategies.

use_cases.use_case: As a {USER_TYPE}, I want to {ACTION} so that {BENEFIT}
As a {USER_TYPE}, I want to {ACTION} so that {BENEFIT}
As a {USER_TYPE}, I want to {ACTION} so that {BENEFIT}

quality_standards.prd_checklist: - [ ] Problem clearly articulated with user impact - [ ] Success metrics are specific and measurable - [ ] Use cases follow "As a... I want... so that..." format - [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable - [ ] Technical requirements reference existing codebase patterns - [ ] File paths are accurate and categorized properly - [ ] Scope is realistic for implementation capacity - [ ] Risks have concrete mitigation strategies - [ ] All sections completed with sufficient detail
